_notes.name: Your full display name (required)
_notes.title: Professional title shown below your name on the About tab
_notes.avatar: URL to a profile photo. Leave empty to fall back to your GitHub avatar
_notes.bio: A short bio paragraph. Supports plain text only
_notes.email: Optional contact email (also add it to 'social' as an Email entry)
_notes.skills: Array of technology names rendered as pill badges on the About tab
_notes.social: Array of {platform, url} objects. Recognized platforms: GitHub, LinkedIn, Twitter, Bluesky, Email, Website
_notes.experience: Work history. 'start' and 'end' are 'YYYY-MM' strings. Use 'present' for current role
_notes.projectOverrides: External or non-GitHub projects. These are merged with your pinned GitHub repos on the Projects tab. Set 'featured: true' to pin them to the top
